prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: villain portrait. Story world: Signal From Kharon-9. Premise: Telemetry returns from a decommissioned orbital array and predicts player replies.. Setting: Mountain observatory and subterranean receiver array. Threat presence: The Quiet Orbit. Recurring motifs: black stars, phase drift, echoing pings. Design portrait of antagonist The Quiet Orbit with archetype CALM_GENIUS_MANIPULATOR, speech style "Sparse, mathematical, and eerily intimate.", and motifs black stars, phase drift, echoing pings.. Subgenre: cosmic horror. Tone: INTENSE. Immediate scene brief: Signal From Kharon-9 - Villain Portrait. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Create a realistic portrait with wardrobe, posture, facial tension, and environmental context that reveal personality and danger. Avoid floating-head composition. Frame as a prestige horror still, not concept art.
source_prompt: Story: Signal From Kharon-9 (signal-from-kharon-9) | Hook: Telemetry returns from a decommissioned orbital array and predicts player replies. | Subgenre: cosmic horror | Tone: INTENSE | Location: Mountain observatory and subterranean receiver array | Villain: The Quiet Orbit | Villain worldview: Human choices are measurable noise in a larger equation. | Motifs: black stars, phase drift, echoing pings. Design portrait of antagonist The Quiet Orbit with archetype CALM_GENIUS_MANIPULATOR, speech style "Sparse, mathematical, and eerily intimate.", and motifs black stars, phase drift, echoing pings.
